requirement_topic.en: Industrial Lithium Cell and Battery Safety — IEC 62619 / AZS Adoption
requirement_topic.zh: 工业锂电芯和电池安全——IEC 62619 / AZS采用
requirement_topic.zht: 工業鋰電芯和電池安全——IEC 62619 / AZS採用

summary.en: Azerbaijan projects may request industrial lithium cell and battery safety evidence based on IEC 62619 or an AZS national adoption or project specification, especially for stationary storage batteries used in BESS racks and containers. Internationally financed solar-plus-storage projects may also impose IEC and lender technical requirements beyond the local minimum.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆项目可能要求基于IEC 62619、AZS国家采用版本或项目技术规格的工业锂电芯和电池安全证据，特别是用于BESS电池架和集装箱的固定式储能电池。国际融资的光伏加储能项目也可能在当地最低要求之外叠加IEC和贷款方技术要求。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆項目可能要求基於IEC 62619、AZS國家採用版本或項目技術規格的工業鋰電芯和電池安全證據，特別是用於BESS電池架和集裝箱的固定式儲能電池。國際融資的光伏加儲能項目也可能在當地最低要求之外疊加IEC和貸款方技術要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes; safety requirements for industrial lithium batteries
Applicable AZS adoption or project specification where required
Owner, lender, insurer, and project technical-file requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024 for compulsory safety of lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. These can support technical comparison but may not be accepted as the same standard as IEC 62619 or an Azerbaijan-adopted AZS version.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制性安全要求，并依据GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池技术标准。这些证据可支持技术比对，但未必等同于IEC 62619或阿塞拜疆采用的AZS版本。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制性安全要求，並依據GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池技術標準。這些證據可支持技術比對，但未必等同於IEC 62619或亞塞拜疆採用的AZS版本。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare a clause-by-clause comparison between GB 44240 / GB/T 36276 and IEC 62619 or the required AZS or project text, identify test differences for abuse, overcharge, thermal, short-circuit, BMS protection, and enclosure assumptions, and retest or supplement evidence where the Azerbaijan project owner, lender, insurer, or conformity body requires the IEC-based route.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备GB 44240 / GB/T 36276与IEC 62619或所需AZS / 项目文本的逐条对照，识别滥用、过充、热、短路、BMS保护和外壳假设等测试差异，并在阿塞拜疆项目业主、贷款方、保险方或合格评定机构要求IEC路径时补充测试或证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備GB 44240 / GB/T 36276與IEC 62619或所需AZS / 項目文本的逐條對照，識別濫用、過充、熱、短路、BMS保護和外殼假設等測試差異，並在亞塞拜疆項目業主、貸款方、保險方或合格評定機構要求IEC路徑時補充測試或證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or conformity-file requirement where IEC 62619, AZS adoption, or lender specification is required; may be required by owner, lender, insurer, or conformity body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024 where in scope; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240 and GB/T 36276 evidence should be mapped to IEC 62619 or the specified AZS / project requirement. Azerbaijan stakeholders may request IEC-based retesting or supplemental evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 44240和GB/T 36276证据应映射至IEC 62619或指定AZS / 项目要求。阿塞拜疆相关方可能要求按IEC路径补测或补充证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 44240和GB/T 36276證據應映射至IEC 62619或指定AZS / 項目要求。亞塞拜疆相關方可能要求按IEC路徑補測或補充證據。
